data.content: Locked in delivery-target behavior for built-in compatibility profiles. Branch-mode profiles now render implementation and implementation_review prompts without PR-shaped artifacts, and new integration assertions in src/poll_claim/tests_ext2.rs verify branch profiles stay branch/main focused while PR profiles explicitly mention pull requests across implementation, review, shipment, and shipment_review. Added src/profile_tests.rs coverage to confirm semiauto and semiauto_no_planning still keep human-owned review gates. Validated with cargo test prompt_body_for_state_distinguishes_branch_and_pr_profiles, cargo test load_for_repo_preserves_human_gated_profile_owners, and make sanity.
